item.title: Challenge Experience Gatekeeping 🚪 • Identify 3 skills matching job descriptions. • Draft a 'value proposition' statement for each. • Use: “I delivered X using Y, impacting Z.” • Prepare examples showing skill application. • Research peers with similar skills, not years. How can you showcase your skills' impact over the past year to boost your candidacy? #career #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Challenge Experience Gatekeeping 🚪 • Identify 3 skills matching job descriptions. • Draft a 'value proposition' statement for each. • Use: “I delivered X using Y, impacting Z.” • Prepare examples showing skill application. • Research peers with similar skills, not years. How can you showcase your skills' impact over the past year to boost your candidacy? #career #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
